summary: PR #2332 linked and marked src/melee/gr/grkraid.c as Matching, with targeted C reshaping in grKraid_801FE6D8 and grKraid_801FE818 plus symbols.txt metadata edits for grkraid data, rodata, sdata, sbss, and sdata2 placement. The PR body highlights data offset and padding issues, later marked fixed, and the bot report records 4 new matches including grKraid_801FE818, grKraid_801FE6D8, .sdata2, and .rodata.

key_files.role: Kraid stage source updated to close matching gaps; include cleanup, rodata Vec introduction/use, inlining/removal of getMapRotation helper, local ordering/lifetime changes, and small cast/assignment reshaping in grKraid_801FE818.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grkraid.c added 20 deleted 36 hunks 12
raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grkraid.c include block changes
raw_diff: const Vec grKr_803B8278 added and Vec pos changed from inline zero initializer to grKr_803B8278
raw_diff: getMapRotation removed; grKraid_801FE6D8 computes max/min/rot inline and includes self-assignment to map_rot_spd_min
raw_diff: grKraid_801FE818 local declarations and zeroing reshaped

key_files.role: Symbol metadata adjusted for Kraid-related rodata/data/sdata/sbss/sdata2 sizes, scopes, local labels, and alignments to support data placement and matching.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: config/GALE01/symbols.txt added 27 deleted 24 hunks 6
raw_diff: grKr_803B8278 size changed from 0x10 to 0xC; grRc_803B8288 align:8 added
raw_diff: grKr data strings changed to local labels @147, @170, @171, @198, @287; @171 placed at .data:0x803E4D64
raw_diff: grRc_803E4DA8 align:8 added
raw_diff: grKr sdata strings changed to local @189 and @190; grRc_804D4780 align:8 added
raw_diff: grKr sbss symbols changed from global to local scope
raw_diff: grKr sdata2 float/double globals changed to local @ labels

key_files.role: Build configuration changed grkraid object from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: configure.py added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1

what_changed.text: Marked melee/gr/grkraid.c as Matching in configure.py.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grkraid.c") -> Object(Matching, "melee/gr/grkraid.c")

what_changed.text: Adjusted symbols.txt metadata around grkraid, including object sizes, local/global scopes, local labels, and align:8 annotations to address data, sdata, rodata, sbss, and sdata2 placement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt rodata/data/sdata/sbss/sdata2 hunks
human_pr_text: author described .data string offset, .sdata zero padding, and rodata issues

what_changed.text: Added const Vec grKr_803B8278 and changed grKraid_801FE440 to initialize pos from that object rather than an inline zero Vec initializer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: +const Vec grKr_803B8278 = { 0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f };
raw_diff: Vec pos = { 0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f }; -> Vec pos = grKr_803B8278;

what_changed.text: Removed static helper getMapRotation and expanded its computation directly in grKraid_801FE6D8 with separate max/min locals and an apparent self-assignment to grKr_804D6A08->map_rot_spd_min.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static f32 getMapRotation() removed
raw_diff: grKraid_801FE6D8 adds f32 min/max, computes rot in steps, and adds grKr_804D6A08->map_rot_spd_min self-assignment

what_changed.text: Reshaped grKraid_801FE818 local declaration order, fVar1/fVar3 initialization, repeated else branches, and zero assignment to x2/x1 via s8 iVar.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FE818 declaration order and fVar1 = (fVar3 = 0.0f)
raw_diff: repeated fVar3 = fVar1 removals
raw_diff: fVar2 = 0; iVar = (u8) fVar2; gp->gv.kraid2.x2/x1 = iVar

smart_moves.text: Kept the final configuration change narrow: only grkraid.c was switched from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py single-object status change

smart_moves.text: Resolved offset/padding issues primarily in symbols.txt metadata instead of broad source churn, using local labels and align annotations where the diff shows section placement changes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: author asked how to place offset string and padded .sdata/.rodata
raw_diff: symbols.txt local labels and align:8 changes

smart_moves.text: Used bot-reported narrow match results as evidence before landing the Matching status.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: 4 new matches; grKraid_801FE818, .sdata2, .rodata, grKraid_801FE6D8 at 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a stage file that is almost matched but blocked by section placement, inspect symbols.txt metadata for size, scope, local-label, and alignment corrections before inventing broader C-side storage.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: .data offset, .sdata padding, and rodata issues were blockers
raw_diff: symbols.txt size/scope/local-label/align changes
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: .sdata2 and .rodata became 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When linking a file as Matching, keep configure.py status changes paired with local bot/build evidence for the specific unit and matched items.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py marks grkraid.c Matching
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: main/melee/gr/grkraid includes 4 new matches and linked-code increase

naming_conventions.text: Kraid stage globals in this slice use the grKr_ prefix with address suffixes when kept global, e.g. grKr_803E4C78, grKr_803E4C9C, grKr_803E4D0C, grKr_803B8278.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt grKr_* entries
raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grkraid.c const Vec grKr_803B8278

naming_conventions.text: Unowned/local data in symbols.txt is represented with @number local labels in this PR, replacing several former grKr_* global string/float/double symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: @147, @170, @171, @198, @287 data string labels
raw_diff: @189 and @190 sdata string labels

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use symbols.txt align annotations to account for section padding/alignment where section placement is the blocker.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: author asked about zero-byte padding in .sdata and same issue in rodata
raw_diff: grRc_803B8288 align:8, grRc_803E4DA8 align:8, grRc_804D4780 align:8
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR does not explain a general alignment rule; treat this as a case-specific metadata tactic.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Convert generated/global-looking data symbols to local @ labels when the data is local to the translation unit and symbol ownership requires it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKr_803E4D00/grKr_803E4D70/grKr_803E4D8C replaced by @ local labels
raw_diff: grKr_804DB620..grKr_804DB63C replaced by @ local sdata2 labels
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The evidence supports this PR's grkraid symbols only; it should not be generalized without section ownership evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Small source-shape changes such as removing a helper, introducing temporaries, changing local declaration order, and using casts/temporary assignment can close final function deltas.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: getMapRotation removed and computation expanded in grKraid_801FE6D8
raw_diff: grKraid_801FE818 local declaration/order and s8 iVar assignment changes
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: grKraid_801FE6D8 and grKraid_801FE818 reached 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Some shapes are visibly hacky, including the PR author's 'Janky hack' note and the map_rot_spd_min self-assignment; do not promote as style without objdiff need.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A named const Vec in rodata can be used instead of an inline Vec initializer when section placement/matching evidence requires it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: const Vec grKr_803B8278 added
raw_diff: Vec pos changed to grKr_803B8278
raw_diff: symbols.txt grKr_803B8278 size changed to 0xC
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is high-risk under literal/data ownership standards; retain only with metadata and match evidence.

notes: No human review comments were loaded; review feedback is limited to the PR body and bot report.
The PR body references Discord help and screenshots, but their contents are not loaded beyond the author's text.

The exact reason each source-shape change was required is not documented; tactics involving self-assignment, local lifetime/order, and named rodata should be treated as case-specific matching moves, not accepted style.
Merged state and bot report support that the slice landed and improved matching, but this intake does not independently rerun builds or objdiff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Fix data placement blockers with symbol metadata before broad C churn
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2332, grkraid was linked by pairing source tweaks with symbols.txt size/scope/local-label/alignment fixes for .data, .rodata, .sdata, .sbss, and .sdata2. The PR body explicitly identified offset and padding issues, and the bot report showed .rodata and .sdata2 reaching 100%.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text
raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks
text_corpus.jsonl bot report

source_update_candidates.title: grkraid.c was marked Matching by PR #2332
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changed melee/gr/grkraid.c from NonMatching to Matching in PR #2332, with bot-reported new matches for grKraid_801FE818, grKraid_801FE6D8, .sdata2, and .rodata.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py Matching change
text_corpus.jsonl decomp-dev[bot] report
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source-owned path fact about matching status and affected unit; curator should verify against current source before recording.

source_update_candidates.title: Document case-specific use of symbols.txt local labels and align metadata for section padding blockers
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2332 suggests that when section placement blocks a match, local @ labels, scope changes, size corrections, and align metadata in symbols.txt can resolve .data/.sdata/.rodata/.sdata2 layout issues. This should be framed as metadata correction requiring section ownership evidence, not as permission to add fake C storage or broad data churn.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: data offset and padding blockers
raw_diff: symbols.txt local label, scope, size, align changes
source_update_candidates.reason: May be worth curating as an example under existing data-section standards; current standards already cover related principles, so avoid duplicating or overgeneralizing.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the grKr_803B8278 named const Vec or the grKr_804D6A08->map_rot_spd_min self-assignment as general style; the PR body calls the offset solution janky and the evidence only supports a local matching tactic.
Do not infer reviewer intent or Discord guidance beyond the PR body's statement that issues were fixed with help from 桜.
Do not treat all grKr_* symbols as needing local @ labels; the diff preserves some grKr globals and changes only specific symbols.
